name: Never-Fail Taffy
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a heavy saucepan.
2. Cook on low temperature until the sugar is dissolved.
3. Cook over medium heat to reach the "crack" stage.
4. Pour onto a buttered plate to cool.
5. Once the taffy is cool enough to handle, pull with floured hands.
6. The taffy should still be hot enough to cause minor discomfort but not hot enough to cause serious damage.
7. Continue pulling until the taffy has cooled completely.
